items.name: memory-default
items.description: Default memory plugin for persistent context storage across sessions
items.author: simplydevly
items.readme:
# memory-default

Default three-layer memory plugin for persistent context storage.

## Features

- Session memory
- Durable extraction
- Consolidation

items.name: prompt-basic
items.description: Customise system prompts and instructions for your AI coding sessions
items.author: simplydevly
items.readme:
# prompt-basic

Customise system prompts for your AI coding sessions.

## Features

- Template-based prompt customisation
- Multiple instruction profiles
